steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says Demosthenes characterized parrhesia as the foundation of democracy, rather than merely a facilitator of the political system.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
A proponent means someone who advocates or supports an idea, which fits the description of Demosthenes championing parrhesia as democracy’s foundation.
The other three — steward, apprentice, harbinger — suggest caretaker, learner, or forerunner, none of which convey active advocacy.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
